auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter the email address associated with your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.verifyDesc: We've sent a 6-digit confirmation code to your email. Please enter the code below.
auth.updatePasswordDesc: We've sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it below along with your new password.
auth.tagline:
Your creative space,
all in one place.

workspaces.title: Your workspaces
workspaces.empty: You don't have any workspaces yet. Create your first one below.
workspaces.slugHelper: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens. Used in the workspace URL.
workspaces.createError: Could not create the workspace. Please try again.
workspaces.slugTaken: This slug is already in use. Please choose another one.
workspaces.invalidSlug: Invalid slug: use lowercase letters, digits and single hyphens.
workspaces.notFound: Workspace not found, or you don't have access.
workspaces.errForbidden: You don't have permission to do this.
workspaces.errGrantHigher: You can't grant a role higher than your own.
workspaces.errRemoveHigher: You can't remove a member with a higher role than yours.
workspaces.errRemoveLastOwner: You can't remove the last owner of the workspace.
workspaces.errGrantOwner: Ownership can't be granted. Transfer ownership instead.
workspaces.memberActionError: The action could not be completed. Please try again.

errors.notFoundDescription: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for. Perhaps you've mistyped the URL?
